family_summary: Episode-first bundle for the Vietnam War, a 1955–1975 conflict between North Vietnam and its southern insurgent allies against South Vietnam and allied states, especially the United States. Whole-war DR would be misleading because exposure denominators and violence modes changed sharply across urban battles, sieges, conventional offensives, and strategic bombing windows.
notes: This bundle fully estimates the Huế/Tet urban battle episode only. Other major episodes are proposed for later work.
